text: Entering the first scene, I feel like an outsider gazing in—people are gathered behind glass, their attention pulled toward a presentation or discussion. There is an energy of collective focus, but I am separate from it, observing rather than belonging. In the second scene, the vivid colors and bold design evoke curiosity and contemplation. The wall’s text and glowing screens point toward research and innovation, inviting reflection on human ingenuity and our place within these evolving systems. In both moments, I sense the tension between isolation and engagement; I am intrigued, inspired—and slightly distant, as if hovering at the edge of involvement, always analyzing.
